docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.90 FILED BY LAWSON ERIC G AS TO DEFENDANT YU GOO (OWNER) DBA HK AUTO SERVICE & DBA ABC PRO A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1995 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT YU GOO (OWNER) DBA HK AUTO SERVICE & DBA ABC PRO A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWSON ERIC G RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU GOO (OWNER) DBA HK AUTO SERVICE & DBA ABC PRO A $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $540.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT YU GOO (OWNER) DBA HK AUTO SERVICE & DBA ABC PRO A
